form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 3rd of 9 at Pukekohe on March 20 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind So Fear carrying 57kg at $3.30. The race before that 3rd in a small field at Wanganui on February 22 over 1200m, on a slow track; 0.7 len behind So Fear with 57kg at $1.90. In form and will be hard to beat.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 11 weeks break. Finished off last campaign 12th of 14 at Ellerslie in the LR Krka Mill 2yo January 24 over 1200m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Dream Roca with 57kg at $44. On debut second of 8 at this track November 30 over 1100m, a nose behind Kinnaird carrying 56kg at $6. Improver who can go on with it.

form.formComment: At debut, 6th of 9 at Pukekohe on March 20 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind So Fear with 54kg at $9.50. Battled home well on debut and looks a capable type.

form.formComment: First starter by Staphanos out of Scattered Dreams. Has a total of two trials prior to his debut today. Suggest monitoring the market.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, second last in a small field at Wanganui on February 22 over 1200m, slow going 3 len behind So Fear with 54kg at $9. Last start made ground from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Tauherenikau on March 5 over 1300m, slow going 3 len behind St Monica carrying 55.5kg at $15.20. Has ability and can play a role in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded at the start losing ground.
Improved on to heels near the 1000m, having to be steadied.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 4th in a small field at Ellerslie on November 29 over 1100m, slow going 7 len behind Incandescent with 55.5kg at $4.10. Went for a break before returning 6th of 9 at Matamata on March 22 over 1050m, slow going 1.75 len behind Mayfair Street carrying 53.5kg at $8.50. Strips fitter this time and can play a role in the finish.

previousStarts.trainer: KEVIN & STEPHEN GRAY, COPPER BELT LODGE

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly (Tarzino - Diamond Dream). Roger James & Robert Wellwood has her primed for this with three recent trials prior to her debut today. Was runner-up in a trial at Avondale on March 24 over 1000m. Don't rule her out.

form.formComment: First starter by Exceedance out of Natural Dancer. Runner-up March 3 at Foxton at her only public trial. Inside barrier will assist chances. Watch for market moves.
